zh.Coventry, Metropolitan Borough of Covent: 英國萊希斯特斯爾米德藍茲

zh.lifeSummary: 當Julian Nethermill於1481年出生在英國瓦維其可爾考文垂時，他的父親Gyllis Nethermill24歲，母親Joan21歲。他和Dame Joan Middlemore至少有2個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1539年4月11日在他的家鄉享年58歲，埋葬在英國萊希斯特斯爾米德藍茲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Julian Nethermill于1481年出生在英国瓦維其可爾考文垂时，他的父亲Gyllis Nethermill24岁，母亲Joan21岁。他和Dame Joan Middlemore至少有2个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1539年4月11日在他的家乡享年58岁，埋葬在英国萊希斯特斯爾米德藍茲。

nameMeanings.name: Julian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the common Late Latin name Julianus, a derivative of Julius . In classical times Julianus was a name borne not only by various minor early saints, but also by the Roman emperor Julian ‘the Apostate’, who attempted to return the Roman Empire from institutionalized Christianity to paganism. For many centuries the English name Julian was borne by women as well as men, for example by the Blessed Julian of Norwich ( c.1342– after 1413 ). The differentiation in form between Julian and Gillian did not develop until the 16th century. Julian is still occasionally used as a girl's name. Notable bearers include the British classical guitarist Julian Bream ( b. 1933 ) and the British jazz pianist and bandleader Julian Joseph ( b. 1966 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Julian Nethermill was born in 1481, in Coventry, Warwickshire, England, his father, Gyllis Nethermill, was 24 and his mother, Joan, was 21. He had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Dame Joan Middlemore. He died on 11 April 1539, in his hometown, at the age of 58, and was buried in Midlands, Leicestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Julian Nethermill est né en 1481, à Coventry, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Gyllis Nethermill, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Joan, avait 21 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Dame Joan Middlemore. Il est décédé le 11 avril 1539, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Midlands, Leicestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Julian Nethermill 1481 in Coventry, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gyllis Nethermill 24 und seine Mutter Joan 21. Er hatte mit Dame Joan Middlemore mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 11. April 1539 im Alter von 58 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Midlands, Leicestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Julian Nethermill è nato il nel 1481 nel Coventry, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Gyllis Nethermill, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Joan, aveva 21 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Dame Joan Middlemore. Morì il 11 aprile 1539, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Midlands, Leicestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Julian Nethermillが1481年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコベントリーで生まれた時，父Gyllis Nethermillは24歳，母Joanは21歳であった。彼はDame Joan Middlemoreとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1539年4月11日に故郷で58歳で死去し，イギリスレアイセステルシュアイアミドランズにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Julian Nethermill(이)가 1481년 영국 워윅실르 커븐트리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gyllis Nethermill(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Dame Joan Middlemore(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1539년 4월 11일 그의 고향에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 레이스스터실르 미들랜드즈에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Julian Nethermill nasceu em 1481, em Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Gyllis Nethermill, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Joan, tinha 21 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas com Dame Joan Middlemore. Ele faleceu em 11 de abril de 1539, em sua cidade natal, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Midlands, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Julian Nethermill родился в 1481 г. в местности ковентри, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Gyllis Nethermill было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Joan, 21. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Dame Joan Middlemore. Он умер 11 апреля 1539 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности мидландс, лисестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Julian Nethermill nació en 1481, en Coventry, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Gyllis Nethermill, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Joan, tenía 21 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas con Dame Joan Middlemore. Murió el 11 de abril de 1539, en su pueblo, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Midlands, Leicestershire, Inglaterra.
